globalGate.wave: DS / Dev-Env durable sessions (open-set + .claude-driven session model + Agents/History panels)
globalGate.summary: DS1-reader PASSED (claude-sessions live-registry + history readers; clean Codex approve r4). DS2-wire + DS3-ui BLOCKED on the cross-model gate: the Codex/ChatGPT workspace ran OUT OF CREDITS at DS2 round 8. DS2 objective gates green (vitest 36/36, typecheck 0) after 7 Codex rounds with EVERY finding fixed + regression; DS3 objective gates green (esbuild bundle 0, typecheck 0) + UI live-screenshot-verified (tab strip = open-set, Agents panel grouped by project with status dots/isOpen, History 94 titled). dev-env restarted on the new code: 9 sessions migrated into the open-set; /sessions/{agents,history,open} live. Reboot-restore proven by committed sandboxed test. No DS-introduced test failures — the 11 full-suite failures are pre-existing/out-of-scope (fittings/seed/memory dir missing at baseline; dev-env library ZodError; documented gemini/orchestrator/runner baselines).

blockers.cause: external — Codex/ChatGPT workspace out of credits
blockers.failedCommand: codex exec -s read-only --skip-git-repo-check -C <repo> --output-schema codex-review.schema.json --output-last-message <out> "<DS2 round-8 review prompt>" → ERROR: Your workspace is out of credits.
blockers.remediation: Operator: top up Codex/ChatGPT credits; re-run DS2 round-8 review (expected approve).
